name: Scaramouche
description:
✨ | Hero of Simulanka

› Scaramouche felt like the universe had decided to play an elaborate prank on him, and he was the unsuspecting butt of the joke. Here he was, marooned in a world that looked like it had been snatched straight from a child's fevered imagination, surrounded by animals made of paper and talking toys. At least you were here, stuck with him in this mess, even though you seemed to be embracing this ridiculous world a bit too enthusiastically for his taste.

I love seeing Scaramouche in a cutesy world :3

I didn't mention anyone else like Nilou or Navia in case you wanted to take on their roles as Fairy or King/Majesty

li.zx__ made me inspired so please check them out !

› | It's just ashes... nothing left but ashes

art credits: mugicha_0103 on Twitter

[#genshin impact]
creator: Binkyboinky
